_meta.name: Single Statement
_meta.description: Minimal. One strong positioning statement, one case study, one set of commitments, one CTA. Nothing extra.
_meta.best_for: Design-forward or taste-conscious companies where restraint is itself a signal. Leadership roles. Situations where the brief is extremely strong on one story and adding more would dilute it. Also useful when applying to companies with very clean, minimal brand identities.

act1_hero.note: No signal grid in this template. The positioning line and philosophy note carry act1 alone. Keep it spare.

act2_work.note: One work only. Codegen should pick the single strongest match from the brief works[] array — order 1. The framing angle carries more weight when there's only one story.

signal_cards.note: Signal cards are excluded from this template entirely.

slot_map.act1_heading: brief.act1_who_i_am → positioning_line (not name — the statement is the heading)
